code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ b: Bucket) -> Bool
  mut x = b
  if x.tokens >= 1
    x.tokens = x.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn show(_ ok: Bool) -> Unit
  if ok
    println("ALLOW")
  else
    println("DENY")
  end
end

let b = Bucket(tokens: 3)
show(allow(b))
show(allow(b))
show(allow(b))
show(allow(b))
show(allow(b))
